item.g:title: Meter Works [Near MINT] Olympus 35 SP 35mm Film Camera 42mm f1.7 Lens from #253
item.g:description: Meter Works [Near MINT] Olympus 35 SP 35mm Film Camera 42mm f1.7 Lens from Japan #253 Description Discover the highly sought-after Olympus 35 SP, renowned for its excellent G.Zuiko 42mm f/1.7 lens and versatile spot/average metering system. This 35mm film camera is a fantastic choice for street photography and everyday shooting, offering superb image quality in a compact rangefinder package. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item Overall, the camera shows minimal signs of use. There are some minor scuffs on the body. A slight dent is noted next to the film advance lever. Please check the provided photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional We have thoroughly tested this camera, and it works properly. Inspection Results: Operation Checks: Shutter: Operates correctly at all speeds. Self-timer: Functions as expected. Light meter: Tested and confirmed to be working properly, responsive to light changes. AF: Manual focus (rangefinder patch) is clear and accurate. Helicoid: Focus ring turns smoothly without stickiness or excessive play. Aperture: Blades are clean, oil-free, and stop down correctly. Optics (Lens - G.Zuiko 42mm f/1.7): Dirt: None. Dust: Slight internal dust, typical for a camera of this age, which will not affect image quality. Haze: None. Fungus: Slight fungus is present on internal lens elements. While minimal, this has been disclosed upfront. Scratch: None. Optics (Viewfinder): Dirt: None. Dust: None. Haze: Slight haze is present, which does not significantly impede viewing but is noted. Fungus: None. Scratch: None. Common Known Issues for the Olympus 35 SP (Based on Real-Time Data): Based on extensive real-time data from other listings for this specific model, we highlight common issues and our findings for this unit: Built-in Exposure Meter (HIGH priority): This model is known for potential accuracy or responsiveness issues, even if appearing functional. Our unit's meter was tested and works properly, showing responsiveness to light. However, for critical applications, users may wish to verify readings against a known light source across various conditions. Internal Lens/Viewfinder Fungus (HIGH priority): Fungus can be present and degrade image quality. Our inspection found slight fungus on the internal lens elements (as noted above). The viewfinder is free of fungus. Film Advance Mechanism (MEDIUM priority): Issues with the film pressure plate or spring tension can affect film flatness or smooth advance. While our functional tests confirm smooth film advance, we have noted a slight dent near the film advance lever on this unit, which is cosmetic and does not impact mechanism operation. Internal Lens Barrel Mechanics (MEDIUM priority): Dried lubricants, internal haze, or significant dust can affect lens operation. Our tests confirmed the helicoid and aperture mechanisms are operating smoothly, and internal haze is absent in the lens. Molded Base Plate Integrity (MEDIUM priority): The original base plate can be prone to damage or cracking. We inspected the body and found it structurally sound, though general scuffs are present. The slight dent near the film advance lever is also a body integrity note. Leatherette Peeling (LOW priority): The body's leatherette can peel. On this unit, the leatherette is securely attached, with no peeling observed. This camera is NOT recommended for: Pristine Collectors: This unit has slight internal lens fungus, slight dust, slight viewfinder haze, and a minor body dent/scuffs, making it unsuitable for those seeking a cosmetically or optically flawless collector's item. Users Demanding Absolute Meter Precision Without Verification: While tested and working, the model's known tendency for meter variations means critical users may want to perform their own extended calibration checks. Buyers Unwilling to Accept Minor Optical Imperfections: The slight internal lens fungus and viewfinder haze, though minor, are present and disclosed. Included in this listing: Lens Cap If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. For U.S. Buyers - DDP (Duties Prepaid / Included) Import duty and standard courier fees are included in the price/shipping cost. No extra payment at delivery Delivery time as shown If unexpected charges appear, contact us before paying Buy with confidence â all import charges are handled on our side under DDP. item.g:title: [Excellent 19,093 shots] Nikon D700 12.1MP Digital SLR Camera from Japan #303
item.g:description: [Excellent] Nikon D700 12.1MP Digital SLR Camera (19k Shots) #303 Description Product Overview This is a highly regarded Nikon D700, a full-frame 12.1MP DSLR known for its exceptional image quality and robust build. With a low shutter count of 19,093, it offers significant photographic potential. This particular unit has been thoroughly tested and is in proper working condition. Grade: Excellent Appearance of the item Some scuff marks as shown in photos. Please check the photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional Status Tested. Work properly. Specific Cosmetic/Optical Notes The rear LCD monitor has numerous spot mold/stains. While visible, it does not impede functionality for menu navigation or image review. The optical viewfinder surface shows coating peel-like stains. This is primarily cosmetic and does not significantly impact viewing or focusing. Detailed Inspection Results Operational Checks: Shutter: Confirmed OK across all speeds, including continuous shooting. Self-timer: Functions properly. Light Meter: Accurate readings confirmed. Flash: Built-in flash deploys and fires correctly. Hot shoe contacts appear clean. Shutter Count: 19,093 actuations. Optics (Viewfinder): Dirt: Slight dirt present. Dust: None. Haze: None. Fungus: None. Scratch: None. Other: Coating peel-like stains on the viewfinder surface. All tested functions are operating as expected. Important Notes: Known Issues for the Nikon D700 Model While our specific unit performed well in the tested areas, it's important for buyers to be aware of common vulnerabilities for the Nikon D700 model. Not all items below were specifically tested on this unit unless stated otherwise in "Detailed Inspection Results": Shutter Mechanism: Despite a low shutter count (this unit: 19,093), D700 shutters can sometimes fail prematurely due to manufacturing defects or component degradation. Our unit's shutter was confirmed working correctly at all speeds during inspection. Image Sensor Defects: Potential for dead/hot pixels or horizontal/vertical banding artifacts, particularly in long exposures or high ISO. We recommend thorough pixel peeping on test shots for critical users. External Connectivity Ports: Issues with USB for data transfer, HDMI for video output, or the 10-pin remote terminal. These ports were not individually tested on this unit, so functionality cannot be guaranteed. Controls & Dials: Physical buttons or command dials may become sticky, unresponsive, or erratic. All primary controls used during our functional check operated smoothly. Mirror Box Malfunction: The mirror box mechanism can malfunction, causing the mirror to stick or fail to return. Our inspection confirmed normal mirror movement during and after a shot. Autofocus System: Potential for inaccuracy, slow acquisition, or failure to lock focus. This unit's autofocus was responsive with our test lens, but extensive testing with various lenses or challenging conditions was not performed. Storage (CF Card Slot): CompactFlash card slot pins are susceptible to bending or breaking, or internal memory card controller circuitry can fail. We confirmed the camera recognizes and writes to a CF card without issue. Power Housing: Issues with the battery compartment (latch, contacts). This unit powers on and operates stably with a known good battery, implying the power housing is functional. Included Accessories None No other accessories (e.g., battery, charger, strap, body cap) are included unless explicitly mentioned. This Product is NOT Recommended For: Collectors or perfectionists: The presence of spot mold on the rear LCD and coating peel-like stains on the viewfinder means this unit is not cosmetically pristine. Users requiring flawlessly clear displays: While functional, the rear LCD's spot mold may be distracting for some. Users relying heavily on untested external ports: We did not individually test all connectivity ports (USB, HDMI, 10-pin remote terminal). Buyers unwilling to acknowledge model-specific risks: While tested functions are good, some D700 models can develop issues like sensor defects or AF system quirks over time, as detailed above. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. For U.S. Buyers - DDP (Duties Prepaid / Included) Import duty and standard courier fees are included in the price/shipping cost. No extra payment at delivery Delivery time as shown If unexpected charges appear, contact us before paying Buy with confidence â all import charges are handled on our side under DDP. item.g:title: [Excellent] Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 Manual Focus Macro Lens F #217
item.g:description: [Excellent] Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 Manual Focus Macro Lens F Mount #217 Description Grade: Excellent Overview of the Lens Welcome to our listing for the legendary Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 Manual Focus Macro Lens. Renowned for its exceptional sharpness, flat field, and superb contrast, this lens is a favorite among macro photographers and those seeking high-quality optics for various applications. It offers precise manual focus control and a fast f/2.8 aperture, making it versatile for close-up work, portraits, and general photography. This particular unit is offered in Excellent grade, ready to deliver outstanding results. Appearance of the item This lens exhibits minor cosmetic wear consistent with its age and use. You will notice some peeling paint and scuffs on the lens barrel. These are purely aesthetic and do not impact the lens's structural integrity or functional performance. Please examine the detailed photos carefully to assess its aesthetic condition. Optical System Condition We have meticulously inspected the optical elements. Internally, there is slight dust present, which is common in vintage lenses. Our testing confirms this does not affect image quality or resolution under typical shooting conditions. Crucially, there is no dirt, haze, fungus, scratches, or balsam separation on any of the lens elements, ensuring clear and sharp images. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Comprehensive Inspection Results Functional Performance We have thoroughly tested this Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 lens, and it is confirmed to work properly across all functions. Helicoid (Manual Focus Ring): Operates smoothly and consistently throughout its entire range, allowing for precise focusing. No stiffness, binding, or play detected. Aperture Mechanism: Functions flawlessly. The aperture blades are clean, snappy, and free of oil residue, stopping down accurately to the selected setting. Important Information: Known Issues for This Model We believe in complete transparency. While this specific lens is in Excellent condition, the Nikon Ai-S Micro-Nikkor 55mm f/2.8 is known for certain common issues due to its age and design. We proactively check for these: Cosmetic Wear (Scuffs, Paint Loss): [CHECKED - PRESENT (Peeling paint, Scuff)] Minor signs of use are visible on this lens's exterior, as described above and shown in photos. This does not affect performance. Internal Dust/Debris: [CHECKED - PRESENT (Slight)] A small amount of internal dust is present, common in older lenses. We confirm it does not impact image quality. Stiff/Inconsistent Focusing Mechanism (Helicoid): [CHECKED - ABSENT] Our inspection confirms the helicoid operates smoothly and precisely, indicating no issues with dried lubricants. Oil on Aperture Blades: [CHECKED - ABSENT] The aperture blades are clean, dry, and responsive, with no oil residue detected. Lens Scratches (Front/Rear/Internal): [CHECKED - ABSENT] No scratches were found on any optical elements. Internal Haze, Fungus, or Balsam Separation: [CHECKED - ABSENT] The lens elements are clear, free from haze, fungus, or balsam separation. Included Accessories Lens Cap (as pictured) Who This Lens Is NOT Recommended For To ensure your complete satisfaction, please consider if this lens meets your specific needs: Collectors seeking a mint-condition item: Due to the cosmetic peeling paint and scuffs, this lens is not for those looking for a flawless, museum-grade piece. Extreme pixel-peepers: While minimal, the slight internal dust might be noticeable under forensic examination or specific challenging lighting (e.g., strong backlight at very small apertures), though it will not impact typical photographic results. Users who require autofocus: This is a manual focus lens, designed for precise, tactile control. It will not autofocus on modern cameras. This is common for older lenses and typically has minimal impact on image quality, but might slightly reduce contrast in some situations. Dirt: None detected. Haze: None detected. Scratches: None detected on the front, rear, or internal optical elements. Balsam Separation: None detected. Detailed Operational Checks Focusing Ring: Operates smoothly with appropriate resistance, no stiffness, binding, or inconsistent resistance detected. Aperture Blades: Clean, dry, and snappy. They open and close quickly without oil residue or sluggishness. Lens Mount: Secure and in good condition. Built-in Hood: Extends and retracts properly, noting the mentioned side hole. General Functionality: All mechanical components function as expected. Known Issues for This Specific Model (Addressed) Based on our database of common issues for the Nikon Ai-S Nikkor 135mm f/2.8, we have specifically inspected for the following: Focus Mechanism/Focus Stiffness: Checked and confirmed smooth operation; no excessive stiffness or binding detected. Cosmetic Wear (Barrel/Rings): Minor scuffs are present on the exterior barrel (as noted in Appearance section), consistent with the lens's age and grade. Lens Optics (Dust/Debris): Slight internal dust is present (as noted in Optics Inspection). Lens Scratches: None detected. Lens Haze: None detected. Lens Fungus: Moderate fungal growth detected (as noted in Optics Inspection). This is the most significant optical flaw. Aperture Blades: Confirmed clean, dry, and snappy; no oil or stickiness. Balsam Separation: None detected. Cosmetic Accessories (Caps/Filters): N/A - No accessories are included with this listing. Viewfinder/Light Seals/Mirror/Mirror Bumper: N/A - These issues are not applicable to a lens. Included Accessories None. Only the lens itself is included as pictured. item.g:description: [Excellent] Olympus Trip 35 35mm Point & Shoot Film Camera From Japan #322 Description Grade: Excellent Appearance of the item Some scuffs and a small dent are present on the bottom of the body, as shown in the photos. Please check on the photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional Status This camera has been fully tested and operates properly. All primary functions are confirmed working. Overview Discover the charm of analog photography with this Olympus Trip 35, a classic 35mm point-and-shoot film camera known for its simplicity and excellent optics. This 'Excellent' grade camera is ideal for enthusiasts seeking a reliable vintage shooter. Detailed Inspection Results We conduct thorough inspections to ensure transparency and reliability. Operation Checks: Shutter: Operates correctly at all speeds. Light Meter: Responsive and accurate during testing, ensuring proper exposure. AF (Zone Focus): Smooth and functional, allowing for precise focusing. Helicoid: Moves smoothly without stiffness or play. Aperture: Blades are clean and move freely. Optics: Lens (Front & Internal Elements): Dirt: None Dust: Slight internal dust, not affecting image quality. Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Viewfinder: Dirt: None Dust: None Haze: None Fungus: None Scratch: None Model-Specific Considerations for Olympus Trip 35 The Olympus Trip 35 is a beloved classic, but like all vintage cameras, it has common areas of wear. We've specifically checked for these: Light Meter (High Risk): While often prone to inaccuracy or unresponsiveness, our unit's light meter tested 'OK' and provided accurate readings across various lighting conditions. Note: As with any vintage meter, subtle variations might occur; we recommend verifying with your preferred film initially. Body Integrity / Damage (Medium Risk): The original molded base plate can be prone to damage. We noted a small dent on the bottom of the body (as detailed in Appearance). Beyond this, structural integrity around the tripod mount is sound. Film Advance (Medium/Critical Risk): The film advance and rewind mechanisms operate smoothly and correctly, indicating no issues with internal linkages, film flatness, or pressure plate tension. Optics Fungus (High Risk): Often found in vintage lenses, we are pleased to confirm 'None' for fungus in both the lens and viewfinder elements of this unit. Shutter (Critical Risk): Shutter actuation is consistent and responsive, confirming proper mechanical function. Lens Mechanics (Medium Risk): Focusing (helicoid) and aperture mechanisms operate smoothly without resistance or play. Optical clarity is excellent, with only slight dust. Cosmetic Body (Low Risk): Typical wear includes scuffs and minor dents, which are present as detailed in the 'Appearance' section, consistent with an 'Excellent' grade. Not Applicable: This model does not feature an electronic power system for core functions (like 'Power Failure' or 'Film Transport Motor issues') or an integrated flash unit, therefore these common issues are not relevant to the Olympus Trip 35. Included Accessories None This Product is NOT Recommended For Collectors requiring a cosmetically flawless, mint-condition example, due to minor scuffs and a small dent. Users who prefer fully automatic, modern digital cameras with advanced features. Those unwilling to occasionally verify light meter readings, as vintage meters, despite testing well, can sometimes have subtle variances. There are minimal to no visible signs of wear and tear, such as scuffs, scratches, or paint loss, maintaining an exceptionally clean aesthetic. Please examine the photos for detailed condition. Optics (Lens Elements): Thoroughly inspected with a bright light, the optical elements are pristine. Dirt/Dust: Absolutely none. Haze: Completely clear, with no internal cloudiness. Fungus: No traces of fungal growth. Scratches: None on the front, rear, or internal elements. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Known Issues for This Model (Our Inspection Findings) As experts in vintage camera equipment, we are fully aware of common issues that can affect the Nikon Ai-s Nikkor 24mm F/2.8 lens. Internal Dust/Debris: The optical path is remarkably clean, without significant dust or debris that could affect image quality. Haze/Fungus: We confirmed the absence of any internal haze or fungal growth, which are detrimental to contrast and sharpness. Oil on Aperture Blades: The aperture blades are clean and responsive, preventing exposure inaccuracies common with oily blades. Internal Electronics: Main circuit board or other internal electronic failures can lead to the camera not powering on or displaying erratic behavior. This camera's electronics are fully stable, powering on and operating reliably without any detected erratic behavior or unresponsiveness. Mirror Box Operation: The mirror mechanism can malfunction, causing the mirror to stick or fail to return properly. The mirror box on this unit operates perfectly, cycling smoothly and returning to position after each shot. CompactFlash (CF) Slot: CF card slot pins are susceptible to bending or breaking, or the internal memory card controller can fail. This manual focus lens is a favorite among macro enthusiasts and provides stunning detail and contrast, ideal for close-up photography and general use. Our Detailed Inspection Results Focus Mechanism: The manual focus ring operates smoothly and consistently throughout its entire range, allowing for precise adjustments without stiffness or binding. Aperture Blades: Blades are snappy, move freely, and close completely without stickiness or delay, despite a slight, non-impacting oil stain on some blades. Lens Mount: Secure and in excellent condition, ensuring a firm attachment to compatible Nikon F-mount camera bodies. Optics: Dust: Slight internal dust is present, a common characteristic in vintage lenses and confirmed to have no visible impact on image quality. Dirt/Debris: None. Crucially, our tests verify that this does NOT cause slow, sticky, or incomplete aperture closure, and exposure accuracy is unaffected. Internal Lens Debris (Dust): A slight amount of internal dust is present. This is typical for the model and era and is minor enough not to cause flare, reduce contrast, or appear in images. Focus Mechanism (Stiffness): The focus ring operates with consistent, smooth resistance. No excessive stiffness, binding, or inconsistent resistance was detected, indicating healthy lubrication. Lens Haze & Fungus: We confirm the absence of internal haze (milky cloudiness) or fungal growth, which are critical issues for optical performance in this model. Lens Scratches: No scratches were found on any optical elements. Balsam Separation: We found no evidence of this critical issue, which would severely degrade image quality. Accessory Cosmetics: The included lens cap shows minor cosmetic wear. Included Accessories Lens Cap (Front) Only the items pictured and listed above are included in this sale. item.g:description: [Near MINT] Sony Cyber-shot DSC-WX350 18.2MP Digital Camera Black Wi-Fi #283 Description We are pleased to offer this excellent condition Sony Cyber-shot DSC-WX350 18.2MP Digital Camera. Known for its powerful zoom, compact design, and built-in Wi-Fi, this camera is perfect for capturing high-quality photos and videos on the go. We thoroughly inspect and test every item to ensure it meets our strict quality standards. Grade: Near Mint Appearance of the item This camera is in overall Near Mint condition. Weakness-First Disclosure: A minor scuff is present on the camera body. Please review the detailed photos provided for its exact appearance. This is a cosmetic imperfection and does not affect the camera's functionality. Please check the photos for detailed condition of the product. Functional Status & Inspection Results We have thoroughly tested this camera, and it works properly. Our detailed inspection confirms: Shutter: Fully operational at all speeds. Self-timer: Functions correctly. Light Meter: Provides accurate readings. Flash: Fires consistently and reliably. Autofocus (AF): Fast and precise. Helicoid (Lens Zoom/Focus Mechanism): Operates smoothly. Aperture: Opens and closes without issue. Optical System Inspection We carefully inspected the lens optics and found: Dirt: Slight internal dirt present. Dust: None. Haze: None. Fungus: None. Scratches: None. Impact on Image Quality: We have confirmed through test shots that the slight internal dirt has no discernible effect on captured images. If you have any question or concern, please do not hesitate to contact me. Thank you for visiting. Known Issues for Sony Cyber-shot DSC-WX350 Model While this particular unit performs excellently, we believe in transparency. Based on our extensive database, here are common issues known for the DSC-WX350 model, along with our findings for this specific camera: Cosmetic Damage/Wear (e.g., dents, scratches, scuffs, paint loss): This unit exhibits a minor scuff (as disclosed above). No other significant cosmetic damage, dents, or paint loss were observed, aligning with its 'Near Mint' grade. Optics Dust/Internal Dirt: Our inspection found slight internal dirt (not dust) in the lens, which does not affect image quality. This unit is free from significant dust, haze, fungus, or scratches. General Functionality/Electronics/Power Failure (e.g., non-functional, won't power on, unresponsive controls): This unit powers on, functions normally, and has passed all operational checks without any issues related to electronics, power, or general functionality. No corroded battery contacts were found. Controls (sticky/unresponsive buttons/dials): All physical buttons (shutter, menu, zoom) and command dials are fully responsive and operate smoothly without stickiness or erratic behavior. Flash (fails to fire, inconsistent, long recycle): The built-in flash on this unit fires consistently and correctly with normal recycle times. Shutter Control Failure (inaccurate speeds): The shutter on this unit operates accurately at all speeds, and the light meter provides correct exposure readings. This camera has been meticulously inspected against these common potential issues and is confirmed to be in excellent working condition. Included Accessories Battery Charger Please note that any accessories not listed above are not included. This Product Is NOT Recommended For: Collectors requiring absolutely pristine, flawless cosmetics: While in Near Mint grade, this unit has a disclosed scuff.
